name: Motion Studio
short_description: Motion Studio delivers an entire, cataloged motion capture library for use in your Game, Film, and Animation projects.
detailed_description:
Motion Studio delivers an entire, cataloged motion capture library for use in your Game, Film, and Animation projects.

Features

  • Quickly preview animations on hover
  • Categorized motions for different projects
  • Load motions into a large viewer with playback controls and frame scrubbing
  • Export animations out into a format ready for import into most game engines
  • Animations added with each new major version
Motion Studio provides a complete suite of animations that are ready for your game, movie, and art projects out of the box.
